name: Purchase Order Pending Qty
query:
SELECT 
    poi.parent as "Purchase Order:Link/Purchase Order:150",
    poi.item_code as "Item Code:Link/Item:150",
    poi.item_name as "Item Name:Data:200",
    poi.qty as "Quantity:Float:100",
    poi.received_qty as "Received Qty:Float:120",
    (poi.qty - poi.received_qty) as "Pending Qty:Float:120",
    poi.uom as "UOM:Link/UOM:80",
    po.supplier as "Supplier:Link/Supplier:150",
    po.transaction_date as "PO Date:Date:100"
FROM 
    `tabPurchase Order Item` poi
INNER JOIN 
    `tabPurchase Order` po ON poi.parent = po.name
WHERE 
    po.docstatus = 1
    AND (%(purchase_order)s = '' OR po.name = %(purchase_order)s)
ORDER BY 
    po.transaction_date DESC, po.name DESC, poi.idx
